title: Odisha 12th Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Odisha 12th Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Odisha 12th Result 2026 Out for Class 12 on the official website - results.odisha.gov.in on 20-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Odisha Board 12th result.

content.text: The Odisha Board has officially released the Odisha 12th Result 2026 for Class 12 students across all streams. Students who appeared for the Higher Secondary examinations can now check their results online through the official result portal.

Odisha 12th Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - https://results.odisha.gov.in. Students can access their results by entering their roll number and other required login credentials. The result is available online for immediate access and download.
Candidates are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in their result. In case of any discrepancy, they should contact the concerned board authorities without delay.

The Odisha Board has published the Class 12 results for the 2026 academic session on its official website. Students from all streams can now check and download their results online using their roll number through the official portal.

The Odisha Board has activated the direct link to check the Class 12 Result 2026. Students can now view and download their results instantly through the official website using their login credentials.
Follow these steps to check and download the Odisha Class 12 Result 2026:

items: Click on the "Odisha 12th Result 2026" link on the homepage
Enter your roll number and required credentials
Your result will appear on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference

seo_tags: CHSE Odisha plus two marksheet download
CHSE Odisha Arts Science Commerce result
